features.name: tail operation on type-converted integer for mux select
features.description: Code should include a tail operation applied to a sign-extended integer conversion, producing a narrower bit vector used as a mux select signal

features.name: mux with sign-extended and non-sign-extended operands
features.description: Code should include a mux operation where the true branch is sign-extended (asSInt) and the false branch is a shorter sign-extended literal

features.name: add with zero-extended and literal operands of different widths
features.description: Code should include an add operation between a zero-extended input and a literal of different width, producing a wider result

features.name: asUInt type cast from signed integer
features.description: Code should include a type cast from signed integer (SInt) to unsigned integer (UInt) before width manipulation
